title: Monday.com consultant Experts in the US - Fruition

posts.author: Fruition (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com friends,

Josh from Fruition, a certified monday.com partner that services the US.

Our team of expert monday.com consultants specialise in implementation of new monday.com accounts and optimisation of existing accounts including specialisation in integrations services using Make.com and monday’s APIs.

We have delivered over 100 world-class monday.com outcomes that have helped our clients realise the full potential of monday.com.

We have specialist experience working with major industries including:

  • List item

Construction,

  • List item

Manufacturing,

  • List item

Real Estate,

  • List item

Professional services firms.

Our Specialisation:

Project Management: Large and small-scale PMO framework consulting and implementation, we have expertise in transforming internal and client project management, delivery & scheduling

Sales & CRM: Every CRM is unique, we focus on understanding your lead, quote to cash, opportunity pipeline management and integration with core systems like VoIP Telephony and Marketing tools like Hubspot and many others.

Marketing: We help build a structured Marketing framework to connect your Marketing strategy and execution of campaigns to deliver measurable and reportable ROI.

New Product Development: We support all stages and methods of New Product development use cases within monday including: Ideation prioritisation, NPD, Manufacturing, Agile delivery, supply chain stock control

HR & Recruitment: Put some more structure into HR by creating processes and workflows for onboarding and recruitment, HR Request and email management.

Finance: Never miss a beat when it comes to revenue, we help integrate with your ERP and finance systems to bring together your Finance team to help execute business critical operations

ITSM: Do more with less such as Helpdesk ticketing, Incident management, IT Project management, Vendor/Contract Management with Jira and DevOps integration

Leadership: Strategy to execution, do away with static strategy powerpoint and bring your vision to life within monday.com and stay aligned with department and team execution

Get started by enquiring through our website www.fruitionservices.io

Looking forward to supporting you on your monday.com journey!

Kind regards,

Josh
Managing Director, Fruition

Call us today: +13023302496
Drop a note: contact@fruitionservices.io
